name: io.github.nsozturk/tweetkit-x
description: Post, delete & read on X (Twitter) using your own logged-in web session — no paid API.

environment_variables.name: TWEETKIT_COOKIE_KEYCHAIN
environment_variables.description: macOS Keychain service name holding your X session cookie string (must contain auth_token + ct0). Alternatively set TWEETKIT_COOKIE (the raw cookie string) or TWEETKIT_COOKIE_FILE (a path).

environment_variables.name: TWEETKIT_COOKIE_FILE
environment_variables.description: Path to a file holding your X session cookie string (contains auth_token + ct0).
